Care at Home Reason(s) for admission to nursing home: unsafe for care at home. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
M0903_LST_HM_VISIT (M0903) Date of Last Home Visit Date of last home visit (most recent) DATE 8 x x x x x
M0906_DC_TR_DTH_DT (M0906) Discharge/Transfer/Death Date Discharge/ transfer/ death date DATE 8 x x x x x x x
NATL_PRVDR_ID National Provider Identifier Mandated by HIPAA as a unique provider number assigned for each health care provider to be used in standard
